name: field-choice-card
visual_summary: The Field Choice Card is a UI component that displays a card containing multiple options. It is typically used in forms or settings pages to allow users to select one option from a list. This component is suitable for mobile and desktop applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-choice-card
Description: The Field Choice Card is a UI component that displays a card containing multiple options. It is typically used in forms or settings pages to allow users to select one option from a list. This component is suitable for mobile and desktop applications.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable, animated
Tags: field, choice, card, form, settings, option

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
